description_long: This is a hand axe with a long, cylindrical wooden handle wrapped in a dark, textured grip material. The axe head is forged from metal, featuring a single broad, slightly curved blade with a sharp edge and a pronounced beard. The blade is stained with a reddish coloration, possibly simulating rust or dried residue, and is securely mounted to the handle. The handle shows a natural wood grain pattern, with some areas appearing darker, likely from wear or intentional coloring. There is a visible white marking or label near the top of the handle, adjacent to the blade, which may indicate a serial number or identifier.
description: A long-handled axe with a dark, grippy wooden shaft and a single, broad metal blade stained red, featuring a white marking near the head.
description_view_0: The axe is seen at an angle, highlighting the top of the handle and the upper part of the blade, with the white marking partially visible.
description_view_1: A clear side profile of the axe, showing the full length of the handle and the entire blade, with the red-stained edge and white marking prominent.
description_view_2: The axe is viewed from the back, emphasizing the curvature of the handle and the rear of the blade, with less detail on the blade's edge.
description_view_3: A direct side view of the axe, displaying the full blade profile, the red-stained edge, and the white marking near the head.
attribute_handle_type: Long, cylindrical wooden handle with a dark, textured grip; slightly curved with a rounded end; appears wrapped for enhanced grip.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad steel blade with a curved edge and pronounced beard; red-stained edge; rectangular poll; no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the handle and secured at the top.
attribute_visible_markings_or_labels: white marking with text near the blade
